basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Project Associate, Project Assistant and More Posts. Candidates with Ph.D / M.Tech, M.Sc, B.E/B.Tech Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 02-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Roorkee official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D / M.Tech. in Disaster Mitigation & Management / Earthquake Engineering / Earth Sciences or equivalent, B.Tech in any stream / M.Sc. in Computer Sciences or equivalent, Diploma (3 years duration) or graduate, Diploma (3 years duration) or B.Tech. in Electronics and Communications
